title: Podium places for triathle and biathle athletes
bodyText:
Gallery

GEORGE NEWS - Eden Modern Pentathlon Association (MPA) athletes achieved remarkable results during the South African Championships in East London over the long weekend on 9 and 10 August.

The Eden district, as part of the Western Cape Province, contributed towards the Western Cape province's overall success as the best province in the country for the following categories: Triathle Juniors and Seniors; Triathle Overall Best Province; Biathle Juniors and Seniors; Biathle Overall Best Province.


> Eden MPA athletes who made the qualifying standard may represent South Africa during the 2024 UIPM Biathle and Triathle World Championships in Egypt on 10 to 13 October.


GALLERY - Eden Modern Pentathlon Association athletes shine in SA Champs

For more information on this multi-sport, contact Mariska Haasbroek on 079 895 8001 and follow Eden MPA on facebook: 'Eden Modern Pentathlon Association Biathle'.

Marius Meyer


> Triathle Podium placings:


u.13 Keyla Douglas - gold

u.13 Wanru Haasbroek - gold

u.13 Ruan Share - bronze

u.15 Duné Haasbroek - silver

u.19 Marilie Duvenhage - gold

Jnr Josua Vorster - gold

Snr Stefan van Wyk - gold

Snr Melissa Meyer - silver

40+ Jeandré Swanepoel - silver

40+ Jan Meyer - bronze

60+ Bernard Siebrits - silver

60+ Anita Louw - silver

70+ Johan Windt - gold

Annabelle McEwan


> Biathle podium placings:


u.15 Duné Haasbroek -bronze

u.17 Annabelle McEwan - silver

Jnr Josua Vorster - silver

Snr Stefan van Wyk - gold

40+ Jan Meyer - silver

40+ Jeandré Swanepoel -bronze

60+ Bernard Siebrits - silver

60+ Anita Louw - silver

70+ Johan Windt - gold

Johan Windt

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
